extDescription.message: Lukk alle aktive faner i nettleseren din med ett klikk.

popupDescription.message: Klar for en ny start? Klikk nedenfor for å lukke alle åpne faner umiddelbart.

popupWarning.message: Vær forsiktig! Å klikke nedenfor vil lukke alle dine aktive åpne faner umiddelbart.

closeAllTabsButton.description: Text for the close all tabs button (Norwegian)

optionsTitle.message: Innstillinger for lukking av alle faner
optionsTitle.description: The title of the options page (Norwegian)

optionsCaution.message: Forsiktig: Disse handlingene vil påvirke utvidelsens oppførsel.
optionsCaution.description: Caution message in the options page (Norwegian)

optionNewTab.message: Åpne ny fane etter lukking unntatt festede
optionNewTab.description: Option to open new tab after closing (Norwegian)

optionCloseAll.description: Option to close all tabs including browser (Norwegian)

optionCloseAllExceptBrowser.message: Lukk alle faner (inkludert festede) uten å lukke nettleseren
optionCloseAllExceptBrowser.description: Option to close all tabs except browser (Norwegian)

optionCloseExceptCurrentPinned.message: Lukk alle faner unntatt gjeldende og festede faner
optionCloseExceptCurrentPinned.description: Option to close all tabs except current and pinned (Norwegian)

optionCloseExceptCurrent.message: Lukk alle faner unntatt gjeldende fane
optionCloseExceptCurrent.description: Option to close all tabs except current (Norwegian)

optionCloseOtherWindows.message: Lukk alle faner i andre vinduer
optionCloseOtherWindows.description: Option to close all tabs in other windows (Norwegian)

optionCloseExceptCurrentPinnedGroup.message: Lukk alle faner unntatt gjeldende, festede og gruppefaner
optionCloseExceptCurrentPinnedGroup.description: Option to close all tabs except current, pinned, and group tabs (Norwegian)

optionCloseAllClearHistory.message: Lukk alle faner og slett søkehistorikk
optionCloseAllClearHistory.description: Option to close all tabs and clear search history (Norwegian)

saveExitButton.description: Text for the save and exit button (Norwegian)

executeButton.description: Text for the execute and save button (Norwegian)

saveExecuteExitButton.description: Text for the save, execute, and exit button (Norwegian)

settingsSaved.description: Message shown when settings are saved (Norwegian)

executingTabClosure.description: Message shown when executing tab closure (Norwegian)

tabClosureFailure.description: Message shown when tab closure fails (Norwegian)

currentwin.message: Lukk andre faner i gjeldende vindu (hold deg aktiv, festet og gruppert)
currentwin.description: Option to close all tabs in current windows
